## Which path does this belong in?

- [ ] 🌱 Explorer (Beginner)
- [ ] 🔀 Adventurer (Intermediate)
- [ ] ⚡ Master (Expert)

## Lesson title

<!-- e.g. "Git Aliases", "Submodules Basics", "GitHub Actions Intro" -->

## What Git concept does it cover?

<!-- Be specific. "git stash" is better than "saving work". -->

## Why is this lesson missing / needed?

<!-- What pain point does it address? What common mistake does it prevent? -->

## Suggested activity type

- [ ] Visual explanation + quiz
- [ ] Interactive step-by-step
- [ ] Drag & drop
- [ ] IDE simulation
- [ ] Real-world scenario
- [ ] Other: ___________

## Draft content (optional)

<!-- Paste a rough outline of the lesson steps. The more detail, the faster we can implement it. -->

## Level position

<!-- Where in the sequence should this sit? After which existing lesson? -->
